positive: A mystical, stylized celestial fox silhouette against a deep indigo gradient background. The fox is leaping gracefully, framed by flowing cosmic elements: stylized crescent moons, nebula dust rendered in vibrant teal and amethyst, and constellations forming subtle geometric patterns. Use clean, strong vector lines and sharp edges. The overall mood should be ethereal, enchanting, and modern. Perfect for apparel printing. Centered composition, high contrast, minimalistic yet detailed.
negative: blurry, artifact, noise, text, watermark, logo, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, poorly drawn, jpeg artifacts, grainy, low resolution, messy lines
